name: Never Underestimate the Power of Miracles!!

issues.description: Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and PlayFromHand action is not supported by card text. The official text only describes a Counter ability that grants +2000 power during this battle. This second effect appears to be fabricated and has no basis in the provided card effect text.
Target scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' is incorrect. Card text specifies 'Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards' which should use scope 'OwnLeaderOrCharacter' with proper maxCount constraint.
